description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build .NET Packages that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow has two jobs: build-slice-compilers and pack-dotnet. The build-slice-compilers job uses a matrix strategy to build slice2cs compilers for multiple platforms (macos, windows, linux) and uploads the compiler artifacts. The pack-dotnet job runs on windows-latest, depends on build-slice-compilers, downloads the compiler artifacts, copies binaries to a staging path, restores C++ dependencies, packs .NET packages, and uploads the NuGet packages.
